reviews.review_text: Lady in reception were extremely rude. Paid for 3 nights, was asked to move sites on the 3rd day at 3pm as they double booked the 3rd night. Was happy to be refunded for the 3rd night and leave. Was told no manager until monday and they would refund then. Was told by management we were notified of the double booking via text, turns out they sent it to the wrong number. No apologies, no refund. Was spoken to horribly. Definitely won't go back. Won't recommend

Great location. Close to jetty on waterfront.
Lovely neat and tidy park. Large sites, clean ablutions very helpful and friendly staff.
Added bonus cafe/restaurant close to park.

lovely spot on the upper level with stunning views over the bay. clean and tidy amenities block, grassed lawns and bbq area.
Travelling over 3,000 klms so far, and unfortunately had to pay same fee again for our second car, in an almost empty park.
we’ve sold our home in Darwin and this was a double with only three vans on the upper level.
Thank you Moonta Holiday Park, we had a great time. The facilities were fabulous and our kids thoroughly enjoyed their time here.
Very poor customer service as I walked into the park it felt like depression I was judged on my appearance
A friend went to inspect the park and amenities before booking and was called a hobo by staff. Discusting behaviour from the staff so I would never stay here or recommend.
Absolutely stunning place to stay view was gorgeous and park beautifully kept. Amenities need a bit of love but always clean...staff very accommodating
Great place to stay, beautiful vista. Close to town.

Awesome views and great company!
It's a great caravan park with excellent facilities and plenty to offer and enjoy! The staff are very friendly and very helpful . We love staying here!

Only a 6 minute drive to the main town where various op shops, cafes, restaurants, groceries and petrol are available.

The rooms are clean and there's bedding, towels, some small toiletries (toilet paper, soap, shampoo/conditioner) and cloths and a sponge for dishes. There's also an iron, mop and broom as well as kettle, toaster and a few pans for cooking. They didn't have any tissues.

Everything felt modern and new. Easy walking access to the beach and a restaurant nearby.

Cleaners were helpful and polite.
A very well Priced park! Amazingly clean, great views and close to nearby towns.

Highly recommend Moonta Caravan Park for a great fun getaway

Staff fabulous and lovely views
Xxx
Heading up to Cliff house great stayz.

Great place to stay in our van pet friendly 👌
One small thing hard to get WiFi hook up on the lower level 😒
Other wise Great 👍
This was our 21st year at Moonta CP and we never get tired of the place, we have already booked for March 2027.|Great staff, fantastic park and the views are sensational, you will love it

Very well maintained park - choice of upper level or lower level right on the beach. Good size sites, amenities maintained very well.  We chose the upper level and really enjoyed sitting on the lawn near the bbq watching the stunning sunsets each night! Crab cooking facilities in the park and a short walk to the hotel for a great choice of meals. Great base to go for a drive each day to investigate the area. We would definitely stay again.

We stayed in one of the dog friendly cabins. Very impressed! A lot of dog friendly stays are older and not the best cabins, these were modern, clean, well set up, comfortable and in a great part of the park. Nice little deck and side garden with lush grass and table and bench. Two bedrooms with comfortable bed and very nice bathroom. We were very happy with our stay. Moonta bay is stunning with perfect walks with the dog.

Absolutely loved being able to relax, watch the sunsets and the ocean ebbing and flowing. The Jetty View Cabin was roomy and delightful and sparkly clean on our arrival.  This is a great destination for a restful stay.  And pretty much everyone (in cabins or caravans/campers) seems to get a view of the water. Moonta Bay is a great location for all ages. |And families would love all the activities for kids… fishing on the jetty, the bouncing ‘balloon’, playground and the water park close by.
Working in Wallaroo and Staying in MOONTA has been amazing sunsets have been next level love it definitely be back some day ❤️
Love this place.

Absolutely brilliant! Firstly the staff made this trip what it was for us and deserve a mention, thank you! Next the villa, it’s well set out, perfectly accomodating in every aspect, and then the location, you can’t beat it! Very happy to find a new holiday destination, very humbled that the lady that processed our booking was such a beautiful person. Thank you!!!
Stayed in Cabins. Lovely and modern and very clean. The only issue os the owners dogs bark constantly every morning and afternoon disturbing the peace.
Fantastic place to stay, the views and sunsets are amazing. Well maintained caravan park with friendly staff.
Great time had by all
Fabulous location for couples or families with children lots to see and do in Moonta and surrounding towns
Great location and amenities, just wish some of the sites were bigger as have a big tent.
Stunning views of the beach.

Our new favourite for Caravan-Park-Camping on the Copper Coast. Colleen and Mark were friendly, helpful and beautifully inclusive of neurodivergence.  Made us feel very welcome (even when we parked our vehicle on the grass.  Just need a sign to inform people not to park on the lawn).
The ground's maintenance was the tidiest we've ever seen of any CP.
A well kept park with some different activities (giant chess board), a DIY dog wash, AND ... fresh milk in the office!!
Looking forward to returning.

What a place. Went with 3 families and young kids. We had the best time and did not want to leave. Beach, jumping pillow, fishing, water park, jetty walks, rocks pools, swimming net off Jetty, beautiful cabins, super clean, very friendly staff views you can sit with all day and a nice little town with everything to visit.
What an amazing caravan park. So clean and super friendly staff. Heaps of kids playing, and everyone had a smile and a story to tell… faint wait for our next visit.

Absolutely in love ❤️
The service is amazing all the stuff are friendly
We spend Christmas there
Everything is a casual walking distance
And it's the cleanest caravan park I've ever been to

We paid a high price for our stay, and we didn’t expect to be spoken to unkindly, especially in front of our children.”

We only asked for basic items.” Only ask for  clean towels and toilets paper

They only give 4 pcs coffee sachet and 5 sugar sachet
As complementary for 6day never get refills,

Why never give smile the lady at reception, my kids just ask to clean towel!!  And they bring dirty towel because they don’t have stock of towel !

This is not good at all, we always give feedback very good service when the staff friendly and nice for all costumes, but i can’t believe you guys can’t give clean towels to our cabin !!

I tough this place good for holiday family and good service but , it’s horrible service from staff not the place,
Place its good 👍🏼

Hope this can change for future staff can more nice and friendly.

Stayed 3 nights and really enjoyed every moment of it.
Will be back very soon..

We just had a wonderful 3 night stay at Moonta Bay Holiday Park. It was an easy drive from Adelaide. Check in was an easy process. We loved how the boom gate recognises your car number plate, so we didn’t need to enter code when entering each time. We stayed in a 3 bedroom cabin overlooking the jetty. It was probably the cleanest cabin we’ve ever stayed in, spotless and extremely new and well made. The kitchen was equipped with everything we needed. Beds were comfortable and plenty of linen and towels. Bathrooms were generous sizes with a seperate toilet for main bathroom which was so helpful. The view from the balcony is stunning! It is a tight squeeze to get your car in the parking spot and able to open doors, that’s the only thing to be mindful of if you have a big car. The kids loved the jumping pillow and playground inside the park. The splash zone right next door was a huge hit. Despite not having a pool, the waterslides were a great alternative to the beach for the kids. We already can’t wait to book again for next year! Thank you for a wonderful stay!
Nice and quiet spot for holidays or quick getaway, friendly staff and clean grounds.
Great location, amenities kept well and are always clean

Booked at very short notice.  Receptionist on arrival was far from friendly and we felt like we were a bother.|While relatively expensive (and pricing is dynamic so holiday times would be even more expensive!) the accommodation was modern, clean and currently well maintained.  View from the cabin verandah was beautful until the hot afternoon sun came in and then we had to retreat inside until after sunset (then the mozzies joined us).|Difference between being called a park "cabin" and a "Villa" is bedding, some tea and coffee and a few (already opened) little shampoos, etc are provided PLUS they have little competitin in the area so the price tag is limitless.
Very family friendly

This was a lovely caravan park, overlooking the beach, close to the jetty. The amenities we used were a tad old and small but the staff kept them clean. Camp kitchen was ok. Place was quiet while we stayed there.

Initially booked a Lower Powered Site ($45) with the intention of putting up a tent, upon receiving our site location, it was obvious we were not going to be able to pitch our tent, as the ground is ROCK SOLID. We went up to Reception to ask to be relocated, Reception advised that all the sites have the same soil and we'll not be able to pitch a tent. So we were offered to upgrade to a suite, at an additional cost of $105.

The room was decent, by holiday park standards, it was clean, well kept, and everything worked. The park amenities and facilities are nice, the BBQ area is well maintained, lawns are looked after, lots of activities if you have kids.

We stayed to head to the jetty and go crabbing/fishing/squiding, had no luck this time, but previous trips we have seen an abundance of squid and crabs.

Location is great, service was good, just disappointed about the tent situation - but the room was good quality. WiFi was hitting around 0.5mbps, Voda reception was pinging around 50-60mbps.
Great place in a great location, cabins large and clean, great ammenities , can highly recommend this holiday park , well worth a visit
Accommodation looks excellent. Our caravan is better.  Hehehe
A great caravan park and I was situated with the beach behind me!! Lovely facilities and I enjoyed the bike ride to Moonta and the heritage train and museum.
Always a great view
Clean well equipped caravan park with friendly staff , and great beach front
Fantastic caravan park, have a great stay, great weather also! Will be back.  Many times I think
Great place, great location. Ocean views. Dog friendly.

Beautiful place to visit. Caravan park was full of activity with kids riding around and playing on the jumping pillow. There are 2 sets of stairs for direct beach access from within the park or gates entry points at each end for easy access to things like splash town, cafe and the jetty.

We have already booked our next visit

A 3 night stay and we were certainly impressed with our motel room our motel was obviously the older part of the motel, but once we opened the door, it has obviously been recently upgraded because it was equal to a five star quality room beautiful spacious bathroom area, cute little tea and coffee facilities massive flat screen TV, comfortable bed what else could we want.
Shall we try and would we recommend we most certainly will.
Thanks for a great stay.

Stayed one night as visiting friends, we were in the motel part as had to book cabin for min of 2 nights. But our room was lovely & upstairs and still a sea view. Had TV, tea, coffee, toaster, kettle, microwave really everything you need.

Stayed with caravan down near the jetty . Great spot . Quiet . Walk to local cafe for breakfast lunch or dinner . Playground and Splash park next door .
Great place to base yourself to travel the Yorke Peninsula.
Stayed 4 nights for the price of 3. Sites were large with matting for doorway and under awning .
Loved it 😊
Great spot!
5 Stars for the large Pet Cabin. Lovely modern cabin, bonus confined outdoor area for our little dog. Stayed 5 nights but will stay longer next time.

We had been going here for around 12 years (twice a year for family holidays) but have never return since the following incident (a round a year ago) and would never ever recommend anyone to this place after the way we were treated!!!

Our email after the incident/mis-understanding

Dear Melissa and Adam,

I hope this email finds you both well. Not sure if you were aware as you were also on holidays (well deserved), but we were at the park for Easter arriving Good Friday. As you know we have been very loyal guests of your park for many years now and have always enjoyed our stays immensely, in more recent times in your company (you spent new years eve with us in our cabin)

However, I regret to inform you of a very concerning incident that occurred about 6 hours into our stay (well that’s the second incident the first occurred on arrival but nowhere as severe). At around 6.30pm we were preparing dinner with friends who came to visit for the day when we were approached by a very angry and aggressive staff member who only later identified himself as Daniel “the Manager” but more in an authoritarian manner rather than in a manner one would expect from someone in charge and responsible for the wellbeing and safety of hundreds of people in the park. After being shouted at for having Gerald there (our 18-month Maltese Shih Tzu puppy) we responded promptly, initially with respect and courtesy explaining that we had being coming here for years and that Jodie had spoken to Melissa, and we could keep him in their backyard onsite at nights if other guests had a problem with it. If Jodie misinterpreted this, we do apologize.

Unfortunately, the situation escalated very quickly, Daniel became even more hostile and confrontational, continually demanding that we remove Gerald immediately from the park (6.45pm on Good Friday evening) even after we gave a genuine and valid reason for Gerald being there, ultimately demanding we leave with the continual threats of the police. As you can imagine we become increasingly frustrated and angry after this repeated careless, arrogant and unreasonable request.  Again, as you can imagine, we and our visiting guests were very deeply upset by Daniel's demeanour and the abruptness of the request, especially considering we had paid for a four-day stay. Regrettably, we had no choice but to leave the same day we arrived, resulting in a significant disruption to our twice-yearly family holiday (always at Moonta caravan park).

As loyal guests, we value our relationship and have always appreciated the warm hospitality extended to us by you and all your staff. However, this recent experience has left us absolutely devastated, disheartened and more importantly shocked. How could this happen over a puppy and possibly a misunderstanding? It should have stopped as soon as we explained why Gerald was there. How can “the Manager” be so angry and reckless over something so minor which could have been better resolved the very next morning not Good Friday evening. If you and Adam were there this would never have happened and not because you know us or own the park but because you are both reasonable and caring people particularly of your guests.

We kindly request your assistance in addressing this matter seriously and would appreciate any measures you could take to rectify the situation, our loss and giving assurances that steps will be taken to prevent this from ever happening again to us or to any other your guest for that matter. Behaviour like that from a "manager" will not be tolerated.

We look forward to hearing from you soon.

Mellissa and Adam simply responded by telling us they have a “dog policy” and to our disbelief kept our $1100 (for a 5 our stay) with no refund. But even more upsetting they refused to refund our Christmas vacation deposit which was paid 8 months in advance.

On that we would not recommend this place!
Beautiful place to stay. Amenities are all clean and working well. The view is to die for. Friendly staff willing to help.

Only dog friendly if your dogs doesnt make any sound whatsoever. If it barks at all during the day people will complain. No matter how much sound they want to make when coming home at 1030pm and slamming their car doors 5 times going in and out of caravan...
Excellent location
I stayed on a powered site.  Really lovely park.  The beach front view is stunning.   Very clean, easy to book in, big sites, great staff.  I highly recommend this park.
Very neat and tidy caravan park, great size sites and clean amenities.  A well appointed camp kitchen, clean and tidy. Easy access to the beach and pier. Great caravan park to stay.
Amazing place!!!!

It's a great quiet place to stay has jumping pillow for kids to enjoy, great view and close by to the beautiful beach and jetty for all them that love to fish like me ❤️ very enjoyable and relaxing weekend away..close to the water park, Cafe for great food, has BBQ and big chess to play with family and friends

Staying in a 2 bedroom Villa for 3 nights. Thought the prices were a bit rich when we booked - considering it was a caravan park - but once their "special" kicked in and we saw the beautiful villa, we were so glad we decided to stay here. They must be reasonably new, so it was a delight, with terrific views over the bay, all the necessary things provided and soft, fluffy towels too. We'll definitely be back!

We’ve just spent a few lovely days at Moonta Bay Holiday Park in one of their Norfolk Pet Friendly Cabins. The cabins are amazing, clean, modern, light and a lovely space to relax in and with their own gated yard, the pups were able to chill off lead in and around our cabin. The park was immaculate, staff were friendly and helpful and the view of the bay was amazing. Definitely recommend a visit and explore the Copper Coast!

Great park to stay with family over Easter, a little pricey.
Unfortunately the weather was a bit windy and wet for w few days.
Rooms were really comfy and clean but theres just not enough activities for the kids to do. The playgrounds tiny. A pool or outdoor theatre would make it so much more enjoyable.

We stayed in the park for 6 nights and was great, several times even prior to getting there, there phones where not answered and left messages no phone call, when mentioned to them as we where concerned on why they didn't answer they where not worried or concerned. The park was good only suggestion would be more bins and access to dog poo bags around the park.

We also loved having access to the disabled bathroom for our daughter with our own access via our code
Very clean quiet great jetty n beach perfect spot to spend a few days

Great place
Netted Ocean pool just a stroll along the beach
Beautiful sunsets over the ocean from either the cliff sites or beach front
Can tend to be a bit windy but worth the view

Just spent the weekend here and loved it. The cabins were full so we stayed in the Motel attached to the park, where we had access to all the parks facilities and overlooked Moonta Bay having a room on the second level with a balcony. The rooms are clean and spacious with a bar fridge, kettle, toaster, microwave with crockery and cutlery to use as well which came in quite handy as there is a small dining table in the room as well. Location is great, rooms great, facilities great, will definitely be back!

We recently spent three nights at Moonta Bay Holiday Park and would have happily stayed longer. We had a waterfront site which was just wonderful. I have seen other reviews suggesting that the sites are tight but that was not our experience. Communication from the park with the booking, check-in and departure processes was excellent. We would definitely return to this caravan park in future!
Loved this spot. It's one of my favourites around SA. Staff were friendly.  We definitely will be back

What a beautiful caravan park, certainly been updated and modernises. Can only comment on the caravan side.
Beach ⛱️ wonderful for those with children, jetty always great for swimming in the enclosed net area with pontoons, fishing, near by cafe excellent. Drive through sites, lots of sites right on the water, water park just outside the park for the kids, slides, etc.
The prices are good.

Unreal location right on the water. The staff were lovely park is nice and quiet at night.
Splash park for kids attached to the caravan park, jetty to fish off, go crabbing on the low tide, the town itself has all your supplies you need. Ye Olde cafe next to the caravan park dose great food. Defiantly coming back. Best park we have stayed at to date. Thankyou moonta caravan park
I like it so much

What a great spot! First time staying here. We took our caravan and stayed on the upper level overlooking the ocean. With lush grass in front of our van, plus plenty of room for vehicle parking and reversing made it an easy and welcoming place to stay. Staff were terrific and the amenities clean and in good condition albeit a little dated. Lots to explore within walking distance. Would absolutely recommend. We're happy campers!!
Amazing park, Amazing views, beachfront powered site was gorgeous. Clean and fresh facilities, We will be back.
Beautiful spot.

Booked for a week stayed for 2 nights just didn't realise life was that tight in a sardine can, disgraceful amenities and very  poorly maintained, we have lived permanently on the road for the past 4 yrs stayed in many parks in 3 states and by far this is the worst park of all, caravanning and holidaying is sometimes not all about the view, their game needs massive improvement for us to rate it.

Been coming for approx 20 years
Love it    Have a foreshore site and it's the best
A great caravan park and a superb location
Great location, super welcoming, friendly service! Very well priced as well

Managed to do a sneaky weekend away with the Fam to this HP, and it did not disappoint.  The facilities were nice and clean. We had a semi waterfront stand, and we loved it. It's a real shame they don't have a swimming pool as we would've enjoyed it more. I guess the massive pool in front of the HP makes up for it, but not everyone is always keen to take a 500M walk to the low tide enclosure.
Nevertheless, We loved the stay.

Family booked for the long weekend next year, and paid deposits. Only to have a phone call from Melissa to cancel it, and have it held "just in case this year's campers want it". How can you give away a booking to someone who hasn't even asked for it, let alone paid a deposit??
Poor form people!!!
Did get the deposit back.
We have now booked Wallaroo Caravan Park, and can't wait! The facilities are much nicer there anyways.
Top sunsets. Great park.
Loved every ery minute of it with our caravan
Great park with amazing views, clean amenities, and friendly staff

We were meant to stay 1 night but stayed 4!! Well done team! Lovely park near the jetty at Moonta Bay. The service was top notch from everyone we came across - Colleen, Liz, Melissa and Daniel to name a few, all were lovely people. The facilities are great and all amenities were clean. We stayed in an unpowered site for the time there on the lower level. Great location out of the winds with our roof top tent camper trailer and great walking distance to catch squid at the jetty or take a dip in the ocean. On our last day we asked for the best way to Flinders and Daniel marked out the most scenic way on a map and dropped it down to our camp for us while we were out - thanks mate! We will be back one day on our next lap! Cheers Fauve and Adam @offtrack_explorers
What a great Holiday with our family

Beautiful cabin! Wonderful view of the ocean.
But car parking space is very inadequate. Way too narrow for SUVs!
Nice

Disappointed by Lack of Compassion in Difficult Circumstances

I wish I could have left a positive review, but unfortunately, our experience was deeply disappointing due to a family bereavement. We made a last-minute booking, only 10 days before our planned stay, and shortly after, we had a family member pass away in Melbourne. My husband needed to attend the funeral, so we reached out to the park to cancel our booking as soon as we were informed.

I was extremely disappointed by how my request was handled. After several attempts to contact the park, I finally spoke with the "manager," Vanessa, who repeatedly referred to the terms and conditions on the website. Despite explaining our circumstances, all I received was the cold response that there was nothing they could do.

Given that you are a small, family-owned business, I truly expected more flexibility, compassion, and understanding. You're not a large chain like Big 4 or Discovery Parks, and I strongly believe you have the ability to make exceptions in situations like ours. Unfortunately, your decision to decline our request has left us $350 out of pocket and, more importantly, left us feeling that the families who support your business aren’t valued.

I am truly surprised and disappointed, especially considering the tough economic times we're all facing. I hope you'll reconsider your approach to handling such sensitive situations in the future.

Thanks guys for another great stay. Fantastic customer service from you all. Amenities were attended to multiple times each day. Having to cope with those who choose not to use the outside shower to wash sand off before using the amenities makes your work harder but you do an awesome job. So much for our grandson to do as well. See you at Easter 🐇
Knocked back a pregnant women and a toddler for a quick shower. Thankfully Port Hughes caravan park was a bit more compassionate.

Scenery Is great facility's are pretty good ..
Neighbours to the caravan park tho its rough . Techno playing over the park for 5 hours a day.wish the owners cared more cause the patrons are all talking about it... makes a great holiday averave
F4
Excellent location, camping very clean and loved. Great customer service. We will definitely come back more frequently. It’s just 500m away from one of the best beaches in SA.

Amazing place to escape from the city life.
You won't regret it.
Excellent accommodation,  clean, great facilities, perfect location.  Shame our stay wasn't longer.
Excellent 6 day stay. Close to the beach and the BBQ area was always clean and tidy. The bathrooms were Close and cleaned every day. Great vacation away.

The motel was exceptionally clean, with spotless rooms and friendly staff who made our stay enjoyable. While the price was reasonable via Booking.com, the minimum room offered did not compare well to other options. I assumed the advertised price included a selection of similar rooms, but we received a room with no view. The staff explained that rooms booked through the website were limited to the minimum range/starting point, making the promotion feel misleading. Despite the pleasant atmosphere, I was disappointed with the room quality compared to others who booked directly at a slightly higher price.

We had a dog friendly cabin. On arrival it was exceptionally clean. The cabin is spacious with supplied linen all in great condition and cleanliness. Everything in the cabin worked and was comfortable and functional, one exception is it would be nice to Lock Screen door but there is no snib or key. Park internet was very good. Only one set of bathroom consumables supplied, should be a set per person. Overall we enjoyed our stay.

Great place to take the family, beautiful location, good clean rooms, great facility's. Close to the jetty and food outlets. Only thing that lets it down is front end staff have sour attitudes and make you feel like you're an inconvenience if you dare talk to them and ask them questions, extremely rude and stand offish. Aside from this I recommend this as your next holiday destination.

Not happy with this Holliday park by any means me and I friend stayed for one night but paid for two because it was compulsory witch is fine how ever when we call asking where our $200 bond is they will not refund it because the floor was sticky and they had to mop it

The kids loved the jumping pillow, the playground and the water park. The amenities are very clean and the staff are friendly, checking into the park was so easy, the new car registration identification cameras made it easy go in and out of the park . We stayed at the top part of the park in a powered site, the views are amazing.
Beautifully located overlooking the water.  Excellent amenities.

Great caravan park with playgrounds, bouncy pillow, and fun things to keep the kids busy. Beautiful waterfront location with a great view. Short walk to the jetty where you can fish and squid. Good toilet and shower facilities and there's also a good fish cleaning station.
Great spot overall 👍
Excellent location , friendly staff , amenities are fantastic, shower was amazing   Great walking out on the jetty and along the beach
We came at closing time, the staff gave us the opportunity to select our site to pitch our tent .
Fantastic  park.

Great CP in a great location. Overlooking Moonta Bay, amazing sunsets.
Amenities are nice and clean. Camp kitchen available, sites were excellent.
Friendly staff and nice location.
Hands down one of the best spots on the yorkes to stay with kids.
Nice and close to the beach
We stayed 4 days 3 nights here. They provide fantastic amenities. Bathrooms are being checked even at night. It is so close to the beach and jetty. Will definitely be back

Great location, great facilities, great staff, great villa's, staff friendly always say hello, Daniel, park owner funny, and always up for a quick chat, good with the kids, park very clean facilities always clean, highly recommended, location beachfront fantastic

Stayed on a beachfront site, incredible spot thats rare. Excellent jetty a stones throw away. Staff accomodating of my many changes to my booking and made check in and out a breeze. Can’t wait to go back for a longer.
Excellent location not far from Adelaide.  Amenities good. We always get the beach front sites. So relaxing

This is our second visit to Moonta Bay and we love it here. There is new management since last time but that hasn't changed anything. I love the fact that I can go cook in the camp kitchen instead of my caravan. And being right on the foreshore, we get magnificent views of the bay.

Stayed here for 2 nights this weekend 16/8 - 18/8 in a 2 bedroom cabin. Easy check-in and check-out. The cabin was great. Nicely set up. Very clean when we arrived. Comfortable bed. Great views. Good amount of cutlery and dishes, glasses etc. Great wifi. Great heating. Smart TV. Great shower. I really could not find a fault with the cabin. We will definitely be back in the future.

We had a three night stay at this property. The rooms were very clean and comfortable with an amazing view of the bay. Melissa and Adam and all the staff were very friendly and helpful. Thanks to you all. We will definitely be staying again. I highly recommend this property.
Amazing views /sunsets close to beach & jetty

We've been to Moonta Bay Caravan Park many times now, our last trip was for the June long weekend in 2024.
This caravan park has evolved into an amazing park with new cabins and powered camp sites.
Daniel & Vanessa are absolutely amazing nothing is to hard for them and they go out of their way to help you.
We highly recommend Moonta Bay Caravan Park for your next getaway, the staff are great, the RV park is great and the views of the ocean are awesome.
Wow what an AMAZING  place to stay the beds great bedrooms and bathroom excellent view the best from our room recommend this place to stay we will be back thankyou 👏👏👏👏👏👏👏👏
Quick overnight trip, stayed in a Queen motel room. Clean, very comfortable bed and huge bathroom with walk in shower.Office staff very friendly.

Just spent 9 nights at this lovely holiday park on Moonta Bay. The park is COUNCIL OWNED. Staff friendly and helpful. A short drive from park to town .The only DOWNSIDE was the AMENITIES block on top level near the older cabins...a SHOWER in each of the LADIES and GENTS was leaking CONSTANTLY. The PENINSULA has NOT had any decent rain since JANUARY apart from a recent storm....the WASTE of THOUSANDS of litres of water a day is SHAMEFUL...COPPER COAST COUNCIL you need to get your act together ...DO THE RIGHT THING.

We loved our 4 night stay here in the cabins. Best views! Right on the ocean for amazing sunsets.. Jetty close by to walk on, restaurant, water park for kids. The staff and owners are so helpful and amazing! We have been 3 times now and love it. Not telling you our favourite cabin, in case you book it when we want to return. Highly recommended
Beautiful place to stay with your caravan, clean nice place, dog friendly. Spotless toilets hot showers. Friendly staff
Excellent small-medium caravan park.  The park is well maintained and very clean. Great location. Will definitely stay again

Smooth booking and check-in process.

Excellent location.

Good and modern motel rooms with all basic facilities and conveniences.

Average value for money.

Highly recommended
Queen Motel room was newly renovated, super clean and comfortable. The beach was a 5 minute away, the park amenities top class.
Spacious and clean. Loved our stay.
Beautiful beach front location. Clean amenities and a lovely park.
Had a great 4 days. Lovely location
TV reception is terrible. The ablutions need some tlc, but good water pressure and nice and hot
Powered site upper level... clean amenities.
Lovely spot. Took out caravan. Toilet and shower clean

Moonta bay is a fantastic place, great location and facilities, but the thing that makes your stay even better is the park managers, Daniel & Vanessa, they are great people, super friendly, nothing is too much trouble, always up for a friendly chat and a laugh. They really make your stay that much better again. Great job guys, great place!

We recently had the pleasure of staying at this caravan park, and I can't say enough good things about it! The hospitality provided by Daniel and Vanessa was absolutely top-notch. They went above and beyond to make sure that our stay was comfortable and enjoyable. From the moment we arrived, they greeted us with a warm welcome and were available to assist, if we needed.
The facilities at the caravan park were also fantastic. The park was well-maintained, and the amenities were well stocked, clean and convenient, the kids loved having the waterpark so close too!
I highly recommend this caravan park to anyone looking for a memorable and enjoyable stay. Daniel and Vanessa's exceptional hospitality, combined with the great facilities and tranquil atmosphere, make it a truly wonderful place to visit. I can't wait to come back again soon!
Great park.
Staff are fantastic, Vanessa and Daniel were very helpful. We will be back.
The 3 bedroom jetty view villas are very spacious & comfortable with a balcony which has a nice view of the bay. Beautiful spot for a weekend getaway or longer stay, friendly staff & nice clean park.

We enjoyed our 3 night stay at Moonta Bay Holiday Park. We were on one of the newer caravan sites on the upper level, for which we were very grateful. We had a nice view and a lovely cool breeze to keep us comfortable on the 30+ degree days. The toilet/shower amenities were in need of an update but were always clean and mostly functional. The location of the caravan park is great, being right on the water front, with spectacular sunsets over Spencer Gulf.
Great place to stay spring to autumn. Comfortable cabins.
The best view of the beach and sunset
Nice camping site! It was lovely to stay there, everyone was friendly and welcoming. Nice view too, good place to bring the pets. The site has everything you need, clean too.
Great caravan park with excellent facilities.

A very big and busy caravan park that is close to the jetty, waterpark and cafe.  Plenty of families over the school holidays with caravans and camper trailers.    The amenities were always clean and staff friendly.    About a 5 minute drive into Moonta, Drakes and shopping precinct.     Approximately 10 minutes from the Moonta Mines Museum.    I am surprised that no child was hurt on their scooters or bikes as they sailed down the hill and around the bend from the upper to lower levels!  Booking recommended if you want a beach front spot.
Great location near Ocean  clean facilities good for young families particularly the water world park all good
Had a great time at Moont Bay Holiday Park. Beautiful sunsets and a wide sandy beach. Stayed on the Lower Level with an uninterruped view of the sea. Facilities were good.
Loved loved this park right on the beach with jetty near by, caught 3 squid

Best Holiday park in SA. Location is awesome and the sites new villas make the most of the views. The whole place is well maintained, clean and has great facilities. It's this park that keeps us coming back the the copper coast and YP year after year. Highly recommended.

Camped for one night at Moonta Bay and it was a great stop. Clean bathrooms with strong hot showers, big clean kitchen, lovely camping sites right in front of the beach with stunning sunset and dog-friendly. Staff was really helpful. We recommend paying a little more for a powered site so you can be right on the beach (unpowered sites were further back).
Was only visiting but had a fantastic time. Encounters with staff were  friendly, welcome  and calming.
Great facilities. New cabins are awesome.

Our 2 bedroom villa was perfect! It has everything we needed and was very comfortable and extremely clean. The views are amazing! What an absolutely beautiful location! We will definitely be going back again in the near future. And especially when our 5 month old grows up to be a little older as the water park there looks to be great fun. He will love it!
Our first time in our van. And the ppl were very friendly and helpful.
Very good
What a find. Great spot by the sea. Good facilities & brilliant water park for kids.
Lovely park but windy as, today! We will be back...
Brilliant park!! Best location!! And super friendly staff!!  Thanks for having us

We always have lunch here when ever we go crabbing at Pt Hughes.
Fantastic pork spare ribs again the best place to eat at  Yorke  peninsula  with wonderful views from the outside dining area at sunset.
Some nights they live music makes for great day out.

It's pricey but the views are spectacular. Cabins are clean and modern, beds are not the typical cinder blocks, internet is fast, walking distance to splash zone, cafe and beach. Attention to detail is definitely something management posses as they have even thought about hook placement for towels and USB ports in power points. Car space is a bit to tight but if you don't own a large SUV it's fine.

Great location right on the beach front with easy access to the sand.
Fantastic new cabins, big and spacious - super comfortable bed and pillows and fluffy towels. Just wish we could have stayed longer! Great spot for a family vacay.

We have been coming here for years now and has never disappointed us.
Just spent the long weekend here with my daughter and 100% enjoyed our relaxing stay.
Daniel the manager drove by every day in his little buggy and said something nice or had a joke each day.
I give 100% to the park
100% to the kindness of the staff
200% to the location
Thanks guys
We will be back

Park has had mega amounts of money spent on it upgrading and putting in new cabins. Unfortunately we had the worst possible weather, nearly got blown away but park is in a stunning spot. Unfortunately Caravan parks are extremely close together.
Beautiful caravan park on the Spencer Gulf, friendly staff lots to do for young and old
Fantastic caravan park extraordinary views staff friendly and willing to help will be back
Okay for kids
Only went for the day to visit family but the cabin was very nice, as was the view. It will be even better once the plants start to mature.
Absolutely awesome place

Great location but thought the rules were full on for a quiet time. Must leave by 10am! Most have a loose 24 hour in such quiet times ... or just don't say anything  ... most leave well before 10am and your caravan park is left looking empty/ unpopular.
Great van sites
Beautiful caravan park
Magnificent views over the water with easy access for caravans and level sites . Staff very friendly. Cafe serves pretty decent fish and chips
